title: AppConfig.FindConfigFile Migration Plan
details:
Migration plan to replace AppConfig.FindConfigFile() with ConfigManager - **FINAL COMPLETION UPDATE:**

**COMPLETED:**
✅ Fixed Program.cs - Now uses ConfigManager for consistent discovery (fixed the original issue)
✅ Created ConfigurationSetup.DiscoverConfigurationFile() as a static helper using ConfigManager
✅ Updated ConfigurationSetup.cs - All 3 usages now use DiscoverConfigurationFile()
✅ Updated TagCommands.cs - All 3 usages now use ConfigManager via new helper method
✅ Updated AppConfig.cs internal usage - Now uses ConfigurationSetup.DiscoverConfigurationFile()
✅ Marked FindConfigFile as [Obsolete] with helpful message
✅ Removed deprecated test - Build succeeded with ZERO warnings
✅ **FINAL CLEANUP COMPLETED:** Completely removed deprecated FindConfigFile method from AppConfig.cs

**FINAL STATUS: ✅ MIGRATION FULLY COMPLETED AND CLEANED UP**
- All functionality migrated to modern ConfigManager system
- Zero build warnings remaining
- All 779 tests passing successfully
- Legacy method completely removed from codebase
- Updated outdated comments in test files
- Clean, maintainable codebase with modern configuration discovery

**SUCCESS:** The FindConfigFile to ConfigManager migration is now 100% complete with the legacy method fully removed!
